title: Anchor Diary Requirements
summary: Product requirements for the Diary as a first-class object: conversational capture, canonical storage, source evidence, dated recall, correction, deletion, privacy, and export.
notes: Path is docs/requirements/ and content is structured as numbered requirements (DR-001 to DR-008) describing what the Diary feature must do in user/product language ('A User can correct/delete...', 'Diary Entries are extracted...'). No endpoint or schema contracts, so SPEC was ruled out despite a few storage-field mentions. High confidence: requirements-path convention plus matching numbered-requirement content both indicate PRD. Filename suffix uses the deterministic readable fallback (same convention as sibling adr0008/00000019 classifications) because no SHA-256 execution tool was available in this agent; slug 'diary-requirements' is already unique across all classification files so no collision risk.
